movie.actors: Emilio Estevez, Pat Hingle, Laura Harrington, Yeardley Smith
movie.plot: When Earth passes through the tail of Rea-M rogue comet, the machines come to life and threaten and kill the mankind. A group of survivors is under siege of fierce trucks in the Dixie Boy truck stop in a gas station and they have to fight to survive.
movie.title: Maximum Overdrive
movie.writer: Stephen King (film by), Stephen King (written for the screen by)
